name: BrokerPipeline — New Client Onboarding
description: Triggered when a new PayPal subscription is created. Creates client in Supabase, sends welcome email, sets up Instantly campaign, notifies admin, and schedules Aria first call.

flow.label: PayPal Subscription Created Webhook
flow.description: Receives POST from PayPal when subscription BILLING.SUBSCRIPTION.CREATED fires

metadata.notes: Configure PayPal Developer Dashboard → Webhooks → Add webhook URL from Make. Subscribe to event: BILLING.SUBSCRIPTION.CREATED. Expected payload fields: resource.id (subscription_id), resource.subscriber.email_address, resource.subscriber.name.given_name, resource.subscriber.name.surname, resource.plan_id, resource.status

flow.label: Parse Client Data
flow.description: Extract and normalize client info from PayPal webhook payload

flow.label: Create Client in Supabase
flow.description: Insert new client record into client_onboarding table

metadata.notes: Uses Supabase connection with service_role key. The user_id will be auto-generated. Make sure RLS allows service_role inserts.

flow.label: Send Welcome Email via Resend
flow.description: Send branded welcome email with onboarding instructions

body.subject: Welcome to BrokerPipeline — Let's Fill Your Calendar!
body.html:
BrokerPipeline.ai

Welcome aboard, {{2.clientData.first_name}}! 🎉

You're now on the {{2.clientData.plan_name}} plan. Our team is already building your lead pipeline.

What happens next:

1. We research your ideal client profile (ICP)

2. AI sources qualified leads in your area

3. Personalized outreach begins within 48 hours

4. Appointments start landing on your calendar

Complete Your Profile →

Questions? Just reply to this email.

metadata.notes: Replace {{RESEND_API_KEY}} with your actual Resend API key stored in Make scenario variables. Once you have a custom domain verified in Resend, change 'from' to your domain.

flow.label: Create Instantly Campaign
flow.description: Create a new email campaign in Instantly.ai for this client's outreach

metadata.notes: Store the campaign_id from the response — you'll need it in Scenario 2 to push leads. Daily send limits: Starter=30, Growth=60, Scale=100.

flow.label: Save Campaign ID to Supabase
flow.description: Update client record with Instantly campaign ID for future lead pushing

flow.label: Notify Admin via Resend
flow.description: Send internal notification to admin about new client signup

body.subject: 🚀 New Client Signup — {{2.clientData.full_name}} ({{2.clientData.plan_name}})
body.html:
New Client Alert

Name: {{2.clientData.full_name}}

Email: {{2.clientData.email}}

Plan: {{2.clientData.plan_name}} (${{2.clientData.monthly_price}}/mo)

Subscription ID: {{2.clientData.subscription_id}}

Instantly Campaign: {{5.campaign_id}}

View in Admin Dashboard

flow.label: Schedule Aria First Call via Retell
flow.description: Schedule Aria AI voice agent to call the new client for onboarding within 30 minutes

metadata.notes: This requires the client's phone number. If not available from PayPal, add a Router module before this step: if phone exists → call Retell, else → skip. The Retell agent should use the welcome/onboarding script variant. Replace RETELL_AGENT_ID with your Aria agent ID from Retell dashboard.

variables.RETELL_AGENT_ID: Your Aria agent ID from Retell
variables.PAYPAL_WEBHOOK_ID: Auto-generated when you create the webhook in Make
